scripts.build:lambda: mkdir -p dist && cd backend/tasks-lambda && zip ../../dist/tasks-lambda.zip index.mjs
scripts.build:lambda:uncheck: mkdir -p dist && cd backend/task-auto-uncheck-lambda && zip ../../dist/task-auto-uncheck-lambda.zip index.mjs
scripts.build:lambda:digest: mkdir -p dist && cd backend/task-digest-lambda && zip ../../dist/task-digest-lambda.zip index.mjs
scripts.deploy:lambda: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name TasksHandler --zip-file fileb://dist/tasks-lambda.zip --region eu-north-1
scripts.deploy:lambda-dev: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name TasksHandlerDev --zip-file fileb://dist/tasks-lambda.zip --region eu-north-1
scripts.deploy:lambda:uncheck: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name TaskAutoUncheck --zip-file fileb://dist/task-auto-uncheck-lambda.zip --region eu-north-1
scripts.deploy:lambda:digest: aws lambda update-function-code --function-name TaskDigest --zip-file fileb://dist/task-digest-lambda.zip --region eu-north-1
scripts.push:lambda: npm run build:lambda && npm run deploy:lambda
scripts.push:lambda-dev: npm run build:lambda && npm run deploy:lambda-dev
scripts.push:lambda:uncheck: npm run build:lambda:uncheck && npm run deploy:lambda:uncheck
scripts.push:lambda:digest: npm run build:lambda:digest && npm run deploy:lambda:digest
